name: proofread
title: Proofread
description: Proofread English, Russian, or Spanish text — fixes grammar, spelling, and punctuation while keeping your wording and tone
author: mikhail_chigrin

commands.name: proofread
commands.title: Proofread
commands.subtitle: Proofread
commands.description: Proofread the selected text in place: fix grammar, spelling, and punctuation while keeping the original wording and level of formality

commands.name: proofread-formal
commands.title: Proofread Formal
commands.subtitle: Proofread
commands.description: Rewrite the selected text in place into a polished, formal register

preferences.name: apiKey
preferences.title: Gemini API Key
preferences.description: Free key — aistudio.google.com → Get API key (free tier)

preferences.name: model
preferences.title: Gemini Model
preferences.description: Gemini model ID. Default gemini-2.5-flash. Free-tier options: gemini-2.5-flash, gemini-2.5-flash-lite (fastest), gemini-2.0-flash, gemini-2.0-flash-lite
